compiled_state.title: Write RED unit tests for id_validate: cross-artifact ID-linkage validation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Write failing pytest unit tests for the id_validate submodule before implementation.

## testing_mode: RED — new source file.

## Test Cases (Given/When/Then)
- IV-1: Given a spatial-layout.json, wireframe.svg, and tokens.md where all component IDs match across all three, when validate_id_linkage() runs, then it returns an empty violations list
- IV-2: Given a component ID in spatial-layout.json that has no matching <g id=...> in wireframe.svg, when validate_id_linkage() runs, then the violations list contains that ID with artifact='wireframe.svg'
- IV-3: Given a component ID in spatial-layout.json that is not referenced in tokens.md, when validate_id_linkage() runs, then the violations list contains that ID with artifact='tokens.md'
- IV-4: Given a <g id=...> in wireframe.svg that has no corresponding component in spatial-layout.json, when validate_id_linkage() runs, then the violations list contains that ID as orphaned in wireframe.svg
- IV-5: Given violations present, when validate_id_linkage() runs, then the return value is a list of dicts with fields: id, artifact, violation_type (missing|orphaned)
- IV-6: Given all artifacts consistent and validate_id_linkage() returns empty list, when the caller checks the list, then len(violations)==0 indicates a clean linkage

## Files to Create
- tests/unit/test_figma_merge_id_validate.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_figma_merge_id_validate.py exists with IV-1 through IV-6
  Verify: for t in IV-1 IV-2 IV-3 IV-4 IV-5 IV-6; do grep -q "$t" tests/unit/test_figma_merge_id_validate.py || exit 1; done
- [ ] pytest exits non-zero (RED)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_id_validate.py; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
